### 🎯 Objective & Value Vector
Explain the goal of this expansion. How does it improve personal symptom correlation, offline capability, or deep dark mode aesthetics?

### 🛠️ Proposed Technical Design
Provide details on how you envision this feature being integrated (e.g. Dexie.js database schema adjustments, React component nodes, or SVG mapping updates).

### 📐 Alternative Vectors considered
Describe any other alternative layouts or storage systems you researched, and why they were bypassed.
